problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Synaptic. Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
